title: Progressive Bosses
description: Makes Wither and Ender Dragon harder the more you kill 'em
body: For the Fabric port, check [\[Fabric\] Progressive Bosses](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-progressive-bosses) (note this is not affiliated with me, please report issues to the developer) This mod requires [InsaneLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/insanelib) This mod makes **Wither** and **Ender Dragon** **harder** by letting you summon a stronger version of them. Also makes the **Elder Guardian**'s fight harder. The difficulty will adapt based off the players around the boss. * **More health**: they're bosses ... why can they go down with a few hits? * **New abilities**: like Wither Charging or Dragon respawning crystals * **Minions**: both Dragon and Wither have Minions * **Caged crystals**: more cages will spawn around crystals, and some crystals will spawn inside towers * **Faster Acidballs and Skulls**: dodging is harder * **Elder Guardian Fight**'s harder and with an actual reward!  * **Many many bug fixes**: Mojang no longer cares about the survival aspect of the game * And much much more! This is only the tip of the ~~tower~~ iceberg. ## Video showcases ## Become a patreon to try out newer versions early and play on the public server. [![](https://www.howtogeek.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/Patreon-2.jpg?height=200p&trim=2,2,2,2)](https://www.patreon.com/insane96mcp) [![](https://vignette.wikia.nocookie.net/wolfquest/images/d/d0/Discord_logo.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/640?cb=20170619082754)](https://discord.gg/mUaszws) ![](https://www.insane96.eu/projects/mods/progressivebosses/general/banner.png) ## [Check out my other Projects!](https://www.curseforge.com/members/insane96mcp/projects) ## Modpack Permssions **Do whatever you want for modpacks, public or private they are!**  ## Stop Mod Reposts ![](http://i.imgur.com/J4rrGt6.png) Don't download this mod from any other website than Curseforge or Modrinth. It might be malware and might harm your PC. Check [https://stopmodreposts.org](https://stopmodreposts.org/) for more infos.
